## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Linked issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `just ci` passes locally (fmt-check + lint + test)
- [ ] All commits are signed off (DCO, `git commit -s`)
- [ ] Tests added or updated where relevant
- [ ] Documentation updated where relevant
